g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the setup() function initialize?')
sendPrompt('What happens if OLED is not found?')
sendPrompt('What runs in the main loop?')
sendPrompt('How does the DHT22 read temperature and humidity?')
sendPrompt('How does the MQ gas sensor analog reading work?')
sendPrompt('What does the serial monitor output?')
sendPrompt('What happens when an alert is triggered?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the safe state?')
sendPrompt('What does the OLED display show?')
sendPrompt('Why is there a 2 second delay in the loop?')
